title: Hiring Production Engineer at Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India:
Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India!
